name: document
description: Standards for writing and maintaining documentation: READMEs, changelogs, ADRs, API docs, and inline docs. Triggers: documentation, docs, README, changelog, ADR, architecture decision record, API documentation, doc standards, write docs, update docs.
codexLead: Recommended routing: `oabtw-codex document "<task>"` for routine docs edits, or `oabtw-codex deslop "<task>"` for cleanup-heavy passes. `openagentsbtw-codex` remains the canonical equivalent.
